sentence: I know I’m a few days late on this platform. Nevertheless, seasons greetings to all across the globe, though no holiday for me these days.

Made in TAIWAN.

sentence: Very pleased to meet with Dr. Morris Chang in San Francisco to follow up on our meeting last year during APEC in Bangkok. We spoke about @POTUS and my agenda for the Indo-Pacific region and our relationship on the economy and technology.
